{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322024517BACB051AA7A4F5B5E065"}"},"total":776},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7116545545464185603","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太精彩了，很久没看过这么爽的书了
南姐的性子，又冷又飒，太爱了[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]
景爷也是够野，和南姐站一起简直，绝了[酷][酷]
小阿铄真是太可爱了，和景爷在一起时，绿茶气质拿捏的死死的，爱了爱了[舔屏][舔屏]
作者大大，好评呦～[赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1656950082,"group_id":"6986926012135115807","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":" 我的世界本没有光，但是你们出现了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8G9YgBCuTt2jDd/skMgiLBWjk8C4LK8eRcl8N3wuHHW","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/73ae07e10f064a3b8d7426fd782f3c48~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708607&x-signature=uPlgg7H2e9kvggzNWIAnV3u%2B8gU%3D","user_id":"4354482264880551","user_name":"重庆山城少年"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4354482264880551","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6986926012135115807","book_info":{"abstract":"【女主飒，酷拽，马甲多，团宠，高甜无虐。】
都说宋家大小姐是十足十的草包，又是个病秧子，加上自小在乡下长大，定是没有见过什么大世面。
但谁能告诉他们，那个被赛车界大神屁颠屁颠的叫着师傅的人是谁？
那个把股票玩到飞起的又是谁？
赌石界大神个个求她指点，黑客榜上第一竟也是这草包？
就连京城里咳一咳都能让地震一震的景爷也发话了：我家小朋友身体不好很多东西也不会，你们不要欺负她。
